title: Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services!
